text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of summer camp, where we plan
to boost Curren Chan's skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is held on a beach along the coast,
and Curren Chan is excited about the chance to
take a lot of cute videos.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she doesn't want to film herself training.
It appears she'd like to curate the moments of
cuteness she chooses shows the world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds to me like Curren Chan is aiming for
perfection in both her training and cuteness.
